name: Liftoff
description: Liftoff — growth acceleration platform for mobile user acquisition, engagement and monetization; operates Liftoff Creative (Vungle) and GameRefinery and pursues IPO ambitions.

seo.title: Liftoff — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Liftoff: Liftoff — growth acceleration platform for mobile user acquisition, engagement and monetization; operates Liftoff Creative (Vungle) and GameRefinery an

when_to_use: Mobile UA and retargeting via Liftoff DSP + Vungle creative network
GameRefinery competitive intelligence integrated with Liftoff growth platform
Creative optimization and video ad production for mobile game UA campaigns
Full-funnel growth acceleration combining UA, creative, and monetization data

cons: Not an ASO platform in the keyword sense
Less value for organic store growth
review.verdict: Heavyweight UA/monetization stack for big spenders, not a pick for keyword-level ASO work.
review.best_for: Large mobile advertisers needing integrated UA + creative + monetization
review.not_for: Indies or teams focused on organic ASO
